overview: A premium SaaS-grade Agency Management System for digital agencies. Manage clients, projects, tasks, finances, and analytics in one polished dashboard. Built with a modern design system featuring deep indigo branding, smooth micro-interactions, and a clean card-based layout that looks and feels like a professional product.
features: Premium design system with deep indigo/purple branding and gradient headers
7-metric dashboard with overdue alerts and pending payment highlights
Client management with per-client revenue analytics
Project management with smart deadline alerts and payment status tracking
Advanced task calendar with color-coded dots and priority levels
Finance tracker with income, expense, and net profit cards
Analytics page with revenue vs expense charts, project status pie, and payment insights
Smooth micro-interactions: hover lifts, button press animations, card elevations
